flowParts.name: Send Follow ups
flowParts.description: Send Infor a copy of the Follow ups from the demo

input.name: $useDefaultFromAddress
input.description: Email parameter, to use default enviroment configured email or logged-in user email. true for default enviroment

input.name: $language
input.description: Language parameter, for example 'en' or 'en-US'. Enables localized error messages.

inputBody.name: body
inputBody.description: Model of request body with necessary data for send E-Mail message.

flowParts.name: Format Follow ups
flowParts.description: Formats any follow ups to work propertly in IDM email

flowParts.name: Send Email
flowParts.description: Send prospect/customer a copy of the Tech Presentation

input.name: $useDefaultFromAddress
input.description: Email parameter, to use default enviroment configured email or logged-in user email. true for default enviroment

input.name: $language
input.description: Language parameter, for example 'en' or 'en-US'. Enables localized error messages.

inputBody.name: body
inputBody.description: Model of request body with necessary data for send E-Mail message.

flowParts.name: Get Latest PID API
flowParts.description: Gets the latest copy of the Infor OS Technical Presentation

input.name: $offset
input.description: Start index of the search. Use 0 for the first item.

input.name: $limit
input.description: The maximum number of returned items. Must be between 0 and 1000.

input.name: $includeCount
input.description: If a search count should be included in the result, including a count may result that the operation takes longer time to execute

input.name: $state
input.description: The document state to search for (0 = Active, 1 = Archived and 2 = Deleted).

input.name: $language
input.description: Language parameter, for example 'en' or 'en-US'. Enables localized error messages.

name: Send_Presentation
description: This workflow generates a copy of the Infor OS Technical Presentation, attaches it to an email and sends to the given email address provided.
